text.title: Four Mandatory Gates: Spec, Plan, Diff, PR
text.summary: Copilot Workspace's contract: the agent emits a spec, a plan, a diff, and a PR as four separate human-editable artefacts; skipping any gate is a hard refusal at the orchestrator.

section.title: Per-gate artefacts and edit points
section.p: Each gate produces one artefact the human can edit in place before the next gate runs. The orchestrator refuses to advance if the previous artefact is missing or untouched-but-unapproved.

rule.statement: The agent MUST produce four artefacts in strict order: (a) `spec.md` containing current-state and desired-state bullet lists, (b) `plan.md` listing per-file changes with line-range hints, (c) `diff.patch` containing the actual edit, (d) the PR. Each gate emits its artefact, waits for an explicit human "approve" event (UI button click in Workspace, or a `:white_check_mark:` reaction on the gate comment for headless runs), and only then advances. The agent MUST refuse to generate gate N+1 if gate N has no approval event in its journal; refusal lands as a comment "blocked at gate N" and the run aborts.
rule.rationale: GitHub's four-stage gate is the documented Copilot Workspace contract precisely so reviewers can edit the spec/plan cheaply before the diff exists. The ~30% agentic PR fail-rate reported in April 2026 concentrates in runs that skipped intermediate gates, because misread intent flows downstream and burns a review cycle on rework.

example.code: gates: - id: spec artefact: .copilot/spec.md require_human_approve: true - id: plan artefact: .copilot/plan.md require_human_approve: true - id: diff artefact: .copilot/diff.patch require_human_approve: true - id: pr artefact: github.pull_request on_skip: refuse_and_comment "blocked at gate {{id}}"
example.note: Four artefacts, four approvals, no skip path.

example.code: gates: - id: pr artefact: github.pull_request body: "auto-generated by agent"
example.note: Single-gate flow — the agent emits a PR with no spec or plan, reviewers must reconstruct intent from the diff, fail-rate spikes.

antipattern.description: Agent emits all four artefacts in a single comment to "save round-trips".
antipattern.reason: Defeats the per-gate edit point; reviewers cannot edit the spec without also seeing the diff, so they anchor on the diff and skip the cheap spec correction.

section.reference: PR body template with `Closes #N` and snapshot link slot.
